package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_mutex_for_atomic_counter: `mu.Lock(); count++; mu.Unlock()` for simple integer counters
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule675PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario675Positive(records []Rule675PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
